steps.action: Query SELECT DISTINCT name_source FROM sessions

steps.observed: sess_test_auto_named has 'auto', sess_test_user_renamed has 'user', test sessions have 'default'

VAL-NAME-005.evidence: SQLite query: sessions table has name_source column (TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default'). Distinct values: default, auto, user. sess_test_auto_named=auto, sess_test_user_renamed=user, others=default.

VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: API: curl returns 2 image objects with /api/images/ URLs, individual image serves as image/png 200 OK. UI: Screenshot /tmp/session-images.png shows 2 test images rendered on session detail page.

VAL-CROSS-003.title: Summary visible in past session detail

steps.observed: Page shows SUMMARY section with text about ethical implications of AI

steps.expected: Text mentions ethical implications of AI

VAL-CROSS-003.evidence: Screenshot /tmp/session-detail-summary.png confirms summary text about 'ethical implications of AI in modern society' is displayed on the session detail page.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Database has correct name_source values (default/auto/user), auto-named session appears in sessions list, summary text is visible on past session detail page, and images persist and display correctly via /api/images/ URLs.
